Common questions about trophies, medals and awards

Everything you need to know about buying personalised trophies and medals in Australia — answered directly.

What are the best trophies for a sports club presentation night in Australia?

+
The best trophies for a sports club presentation night include resin sport trophies (from $18), metal trophy cups for major awards, and personalised medals with free satin ribbons for full-team participation. Alpha Trophies stocks over 2,400 sport trophies covering 60+ sports including AFL, cricket, netball, soccer and swimming. Free engraving is included on every order, and most orders arrive within 4 days.

Where can I buy personalised medals with free engraving in Australia?

+
Alpha Trophies offers personalised medals with free engraving from $6.50, across over 1,800 medal designs. Order online at alphatrophies.com.au or visit stores in Melbourne (Thomastown VIC), Adelaide (Prospect SA), or Sydney (Castle Hill NSW). Free neck ribbons in your choice of colour are included, with no minimum order quantity.

What is the cheapest way to buy trophies in bulk for a school or sports club?

+
Register a free Club or School Account with Alpha Trophies. Bulk discounts apply automatically at checkout — Contact our team for bulk pricing information. Budget plastic trophy cups start from $3.90, and econo medals from $6.50. Free engraving is included on all orders.

How do I choose between a trophy, medal or corporate award for employee recognition?

+
Corporate awards (crystal, glass or timber plaques from $44) suit formal settings and milestone recognition. Trophies work well for team achievements. Medals are ideal for high-volume participation programs. Alpha Trophies offers free artwork proofs on corporate orders so you can see the final design before production.

Do Australian trophy suppliers offer same-day or next-day engraving?

+
Most orders at Alpha Trophies are processed within 1–2 business days. For urgent orders, in-store pickup from Melbourne, Adelaide or Sydney locations may be available on the same day. Call 1300 485 645 to confirm priority production availability.

Frequently asked questions

What trophies are best for a sports presentation?

+
Resin sport trophies (from $18), metal cups for major awards, and econo medals with free ribbons for participation. Alpha Trophies covers 60+ sports — from AFL to triathlon.

What is the difference between a corporate award and a trophy?

+
Corporate awards (crystal, glass, acrylic, timber) are for business recognition. Trophies are typically sport or competition prizes, often metal or resin. Both available with free personalisation.

Are personalised medals better than certificates for school events?

+
Medals create a lasting physical memento. Alpha Trophies offers medals from $3.50 with free neck ribbons and free engraving, affordable for large school carnivals.

How do I choose the right trophy size?

+
Major awards: 250–300mm+. Minor awards: 150–200mm. Medals: 50mm standard, 65–70mm premium. All sizes shown on each product page.

Can I order custom trophies with my club logo?

+
Yes. Free colour logo printing or laser engraving. Upload PNG, JPG or vector at checkout. Free artwork proof for complex corporate orders.

How long does trophy engraving take?

+
1–2 business days. With $9.90 flat-rate express shipping, most orders arrive within 4 days. Priority options available — call 1300 485 645.

Does Alpha Trophies ship Australia-wide?

+
Yes. $9.90 flat rate to all Australian states. Free in-store pickup from Melbourne (VIC), Adelaide (SA) and Sydney (NSW).

Is there a minimum order quantity?

+
No minimum. Order one or thousands. Bulk discounts apply automatically — Contact us for club and school pricing.

How long has Alpha Trophies been in business?

+
Since 1985 — over 40 years experience. 4.9-star Google rating from 169+ reviews. Three stores: Melbourne, Adelaide, Sydney.

Does Alpha Trophies offer bulk or club pricing?

+
Yes. Register a free club/school account for template-saving, invoice billing and priority production.
